title: stylosanthes gracilis var. subviscosa
intro: Stylosanthes gracilis var. subviscosa, commonly known as the rough stylo or hairy stylo, is a type of plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a tonic to boost the immune system. Stylosanthes gracilis var. subviscosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
